name: BPM Detector
author: Giacomo Folli (Ported by Codex)
description: Analyzes audio files to detect BPM and saves the value to tags or playlists.

library.reason: Access library metadata and files to read audio for BPM analysis

kvstore.reason: Track which songs have already been analyzed

subsonicapi.reason: Create and update playlists containing BPM metadata

users.reason: Access user information for SubsonicAPI authorization

scheduler.reason: Run periodic scans of the library for new unanalyzed tracks

scan_interval_hours.title: Scan Interval (Hours)
scan_interval_hours.description: How often to scan the library for new tracks to analyze.
